one_time_description: Restatement of 2019 accumulated surplus for business enterprises due to loans for two solar projects being in excess of amounts invested due to accrued interest, management fees and legal fees
economic_notes: Nation operates solar energy investments through GBEs (2479815 Ontario Inc. and 2479809 Ontario Inc. as limited partners in solar farms, Goshen Solar Inc. generating electricity from solar panels, and investment in solar project #1). AOPFN HVAC Limited Partnership operates a heating contracting business. COVID-19 noted as potential future impact.
notes: Fiscal year 2020 (ended March 31, 2020). GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis; 2019 figures restated to reflect loans for two solar projects (2479815 Ontario Inc. and 2479809 Ontario Inc.) being in excess of amounts invested, reducing 2019 accumulated surplus by $2,539,905. Nation has contingent liabilities: member housing loan guarantees of $222,309, and guarantees for GBEs totalling approximately $31.7M. COVID-19 noted as potential future impact. No schedule of remuneration included in the statements provided. OSR calculated as total revenue minus ISC ($4,040,607) minus Government of Canada non-ISC ($1,354,713) minus Province of Ontario ($2,272,000 estimated from statement) — simplified as total revenue $12,390,388 minus government transfers approximately $7,938,870 = OSR $4,451,518 (largely Gaming and Housing). Gaming Distribution Fund holds $7,904,837 cash which is a significant restricted reserve.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
